use_cases: Primary website navigation with compact pill UI that expands on hover for better item visibility
Landing page section navigation with smooth spring animations between pages
Single-page application navigation with adaptive pill that shows active section
Minimalist navigation for modern SaaS landing pages with hover-activated expansion
ai_summary: A 3D adaptive navigation pill component with intelligent hover expansion that smoothly grows from compact to expanded state using spring physics. The navigation features smooth animations, click-based section switching, and a morphing pill effect that collapses after selection. Built with framer-motion for fluid micro-interactions and optimized for desktop and mobile platforms.
